summary: The packaged reproduction starts CoreDNS in DoH3 mode, confirms a baseline DNS-over-HTTP/3 request succeeds, opens 256 partial POST bodies that never finish, and then observes a legitimate follow-up DoH3 request time out.
expected_security_impact: The run should print baseline_result=success and then show that a post-attack legitimate DoH3 request fails with context deadline exceeded while many partial bodies remain open.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh cloned CoreDNS at the pinned vulnerable commit, built the helper image, started the DoH3 listener, printed baseline_result=success, and then printed RESULT: blocking behavior observed while many partial bodies remained open after the follow-up DoH3 request hit context deadline exceeded.
verification_method: The verification script first confirms a normal DoH3 DNS request succeeds, then launches 256 partial HTTP/3 POST bodies and checks that a later legitimate DoH3 request times out within 3 seconds instead of receiving a DNS response.
evidence_produced_by_run: RESULT: blocking behavior observed while many partial bodies remained open

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
